package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for table_name_literals_duplicated_outside_repository: Repeated table-name strings across handlers, services, and jobs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule197NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule197NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule197NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario197Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule197NegativeService, input Rule197NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
